_comment: Canonical example for the DATA_MODEL block emitted by the solution-architect inside outputs/phase-2-architecture.md. Carries the structured INDEX of entity changes and database changes per service. Field-level details (types, relationships, migration SQL) live in the prose under each entity / change section. Field reference and consumer list live in docs/file-formats.md. Producers must match this structure; consumers extract via scripts/extract-block.js. Strip the _comment field from real output. If a feature touches no data layer, emit `{"entities": [], "database_changes": []}` rather than omitting the block.

database_changes.name: books
database_changes.summary: Create books table with upload status tracking
